entries.title: refresh ui and add in-app update checker
entries.description: Dashboard shows your locked apps and biometric hardware, settings group into shared-corner cards, and Updates checks GitHub for new releases.

entries.title: expire unlock tokens after 2 min, reject non-system caller
entries.description: Unlock tokens now expire on a 2-minute window and the auth prompt rejects any caller that is not system_server.

entries.title: only trigger release on tag push
entries.description:
- Remove branches trigger from release workflow
- Pushes to main were failing because softprops/action-gh-release requires a tag

entries.title: add libxposed API 102 hot reload support
entries.description:
- Bump libxposed deps to 102.0.0-SNAPSHOT with Sonatype snapshot repo
- Add onHotReloading/onHotReloaded lifecycle for system_server hooks
- Add HotReloadTrigger to push config via service on install and pref change
- Skip RebootRequired status when framework reports PROP_RT_HOT_RELOAD
- Add autoHotReload=true to module.prop
- Bump AGP to 9.2.1 (fixes D8 record desugaring)
- Demote per-interaction hook logs to DEBUG
- Add prefs listener for live config updates (not firing on 102 snapshot)

entries.title: bump gradle-wrapper from 9.4.1 to 9.5.1

entries.title: bump the actions group with 3 updates
entries.description:
Bumps the actions group with 3 updates: [actions/checkout](https://github.com/actions/checkout), [actions/setup-java](https://github.com/actions/setup-java) and [softprops/action-gh-release](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release).


Updates `actions/checkout` from 4 to 6
- [Release notes](https://github.com/actions/checkout/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/actions/checkout/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/actions/checkout/compare/v4...v6)

Updates `actions/setup-java` from 4 to 5
- [Release notes](https://github.com/actions/setup-java/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/actions/setup-java/compare/v4...v5)

Updates `softprops/action-gh-release` from 2 to 3
- [Release notes](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/releases)
- [Changelog](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md)
- [Commits](https://github.com/softprops/action-gh-release/compare/v2...v3)

---
updated-dependencies:
- dependency-name: actions/checkout
  dependency-version: '6'
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-major
  dependency-group: actions
- dependency-name: actions/setup-java
  dependency-version: '5'
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-major
  dependency-group: actions
- dependency-name: softprops/action-gh-release
  dependency-version: '3'
  dependency-type: direct:production
  update-type: version-update:semver-major
  dependency-group: actions
...

entries.title: live config updates via prefs listener
entries.description:
- Register SharedPreferences change listener on RemotePreferences at boot
- Updates lockedPackages in-place when the app toggles a lock, no reboot needed
- Demote per-interaction hook logs to DEBUG (launched, gating recents, screen on)
- Quiet recents pass-through for non-locked apps
- Rename "token accepted" to "unlocked" for clarity
